name: @forgeax/hello-character
description: Kinematic character controller demo: WASD + jump capsule driven by PhysicsWorld.moveAndSlide, with grounded-state debug-draw.

bundle-size.reason: vite app bundle (dist/assets) shape is downstream of @forgeax/engine-app + @forgeax/engine-runtime sizes already tracked at the package level

fps.reason: character smoke covers structural boot + moveAndSlide drive, not GPU render path

bench.reason: character demo exemplar; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math and physics backends

spike-report.reason: not a spike app; this is the createApp moveAndSlide character integration exemplar
